description: Wider cargo test --lib compiler2:: sweep shows compiler2_lower_function_mints_lambda_defs_without_eagerly_lowering_them observing one extra LowerFunction stop (FunctionId(1)) beyond main/0 and the generated lambda. Determine whether the extra lowered function is legitimate fallout from the new exact-import/callable-expectation model (for example Kernel.+/2 becoming explicitly demanded) or a real eager-lowering bug, then fix code or test accordingly.
title: Compiler2 lowering/tests: account for exact-import callable lowering in local lambda sweep
